metadata.description: Official Edge Delta plugins for observability, SRE, and DevOps workflows in Claude Code

plugins.name: edgedelta-ottl
plugins.description: OTTL function reference covering 124 functions (101 standard + 23 EDX). Use when users need OTTL syntax help, EDXRedis guidance, or transformation language validation.

plugins.name: edgedelta-pipelines
plugins.description: Create, validate, and deploy EdgeDelta pipeline v3 configurations with 7 production-tested templates and direct API deployment.
